subject: [PATCH v3 19/28] nfsd: apply the notify mask to the delegation when requested

2026-04-28.patch_summary: This patch modifies the NFSv4 server to apply the requested notification mask to directory delegations when enabled by the client. If the client requests notifications without specifying NOTIFY4_GFLAG_EXTEND, no notifications are offered as the server does not provide necessary information for classic notifications. The patch ensures that the lease acquisition sets the appropriate ignore mask based on the applied notification mask.
